notes: lead switches from English to Hindi mid-call; agent follows

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste, I'm Priya from Supreme Petrochemicals. Is this a good time?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Haan ji, thoda Hindi mein baat karte hain. Main Vikram, Madras Auto se

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Zaroor Vikram ji. Aap kya manufacture karte hain?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Auto parts. Hum glycols aur ethylene glycol use karte hain, har mahine 4 tonne

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Delivery thik nahi hai. Hum is week nayi quotes le rahe hain

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: 4 ghante mein quote bhej sakte hain. WhatsApp number?
